steps: Navigate to https://lookerstudio.google.com/navigation/reporting and create a new blank report.
Add data to report > BigQuery > project '{project_id}' > dataset '{dataset}' > table '{table}' > Add > confirm.
Enable Responsive Layout.
Use action "add_chart_in_section" to open the chart picker, with section_index={section_idx}.
Select '{chart_type}' from the chart picker that appeared.
Use action "add_chart_in_section" to open the chart picker, with section_index={section_idx}.
Select '{chart_type}' from the chart picker that appeared.
Click 'Add control in placeholder'. Then select '{chart_type}' from the control picker.
Click the section-level 'add a control' button (not the toolbar). Then select '{chart_type}' from the control picker.
Use action "add_section" to add a new empty section below the last section.
Click 'Add chart in placeholder' in the empty section.
Select 'Text' from the chart picker.
Type '{text_content}' in the text box that appears.
Use action "set_section_stretch" to set the section layout to Stretch, with section_index={section_idx}.
Use action "replace_dimension" to open the field picker for the first dimension chip, with dim_index=0.
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{dimension_name}'.
In the Setup tab, click 'Add dimension'.to add the second dimension of the chart
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{dimension_name}'.
In the Setup tab, click the existing metric chip's text.
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{metric_name}'.
In the Setup tab, click the existing metric chip's text.
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{metric_name}'.
Use action "set_aggregation" to change the metric's aggregation, with aggregation_type='{aggregation_type}'.
In the Setup tab, click 'Add metric'.to add the second metric of the chart
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{metric_name}'.
In the Setup tab, click 'Add metric'.
Use action "search_field_picker" to find and select the field, with field_name='{metric_name}'.
Use action "set_aggregation" to change the metric's aggregation, with aggregation_type='{aggregation_type}'.
In the Setup tab, set the sort field to '{sort_field}' and sort order to '{sort_order}'.
In the Setup tab, set row limit to {row_limit}.
In the Setup tab, enable the 'Cross-filtering' toggle.
In the Setup tab, click 'Add a filter' to open the filter dialog.
Set type to {filter_type}, field to '{field_name}', condition to '{condition}', value to '{value}'. Then click 'Save'.
In the Setup tab, click 'Add a filter' to open the filter dialog.
Set type to {filter_type}, field to '{field_name}', condition to 'Between (>= && <=)', first value to '{value_start}', second value to '{value_end}'. Then click 'Save'.
In the Data panel, click 'Add a field'. Then click 'Add a calculated field'.
Name the field '{field_name}'. Click the formula text box, clear it, and enter: {formula}
Click 'Save'. Then click 'Done'.
Make sure the chart is selected. Use action "set_chart_title" to enable the title and set its text, with title_text='{title_text}'.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Series'.
Find the first color swatch (the colored square) and click it to open the color picker. Enter the hex value '{color_value}' and confirm.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Font size'.
Set the font size field to '{font_size}'.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Font color'.
Set the font color to hex '{color_value}'.
Make sure the chart is selected. Use action "enable_axis_title" to enable the dimension axis title, with axis='x'.
Make sure the chart is selected. Use action "enable_axis_title" to enable the metric axis title, with axis='y'.
Use action "enable_shadow" to enable the border shadow.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Display legend'.
Find the 'Position' dropdown near 'Display legend'. Set it to '{position}'.
Use action "enable_data_labels" to enable the data labels.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Compact numbers'.
Enable the 'Compact numbers' toggle.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='Add border shadow'.
Find the 'Background' color swatch near 'Add border shadow'. Click it and set the hex value to '{color_value}'.
Use action "scroll_to_style_option" to scroll the Style panel, with aria_label='{others}'.
In the Style tab, {others}.
In the Setup tab, click the metric chip for '{metric_name}' to open its edit panel.
Use action "set_aggregation" to change the aggregation, with aggregation_type='{aggregation_type}'.
Click at the first row the report, find the textbox and rename to '{report_title}'
Click 'Untitled Report' at the top of the editor (aria-label='Rename'). Then clear the text and type '{report_title}'.
